questions.possible_score_impact: A precise narrowing consistent with the proof, or a valid theorem for the stronger restriction-compatible class, would substantially reduce W1 and could raise soundness and the overall recommendation; maintaining the broad interpretation without new evidence would preserve the current assessment.
questions.question: Is the intended OENN/sheaf approximation target merely finite-G-equivariant maps on a poset- or sheaf-indexed total space, or maps satisfying an additional order-naturality or restriction-compatibility condition? Please state the target class precisely and identify where the approximating architecture enforces any stronger condition.

questions.possible_score_impact: A self-contained and verifiable account could materially improve soundness, presentation, and the overall recommendation; unresolved dependence on unstated constructions would leave a headline contribution uncertain.
questions.question: Can the authors provide the complete arrow-bundle generators, exact hypotheses, and proof dependencies used by Theorem A.3 and Lemma A.6, and clarify which CENN results are proved here versus imported from prior work?

questions.possible_score_impact: A valid unrestricted-depth indistinguishability result would support the claimed necessity and improve soundness; otherwise, narrowing the claim would make the issue bounded but would remove part of the advertised contribution.
questions.question: What theorem rules out universality of sufficiently deep anonymous relation-message-passing OENNs, beyond the stated lower bound for fewer than d_R(p,q) inter-site layers?

questions.possible_score_impact: Complete, leakage-controlled, repeated, and capacity-matched evidence could improve presentation and empirical significance and might move the overall recommendation; absent such evidence, CLAIM-008 and CLAIM-009 remain unsupported.
questions.question: What were the exact EMG-IMU split protocol, evaluation metric and numeric results, number of runs and uncertainty, baseline implementations and tuning budgets, model capacities, and ablations or transformed-test evaluations that isolate categorical equivariance?

questions.possible_score_impact: A verified comparison showing substantive non-overlap could raise originality; close unacknowledged overlap or continued inability to substantiate the priority claim could lower originality and potentially the overall recommendation.
questions.question: What theorem-level literature comparison supports the claim that no prior sheaf-network UAT was known, and how do the transporter, pair-state, and categorical results differ from the closest verified equivariant approximation and higher-order message-passing frameworks?
